extracted_from: The Trojan Fund (Ireland) (the “Sub-Fund”) Class O GBP accumulation shares returned +0.5% in the financial period. For comparative purposes, the UK Retail Price Index (the “Index”) returned +3.3% and the Bank of England Base Rate returned +2.2% over the same period.
extraction_notes: Also reported: Bank of England Base Rate returned +2.2% over the same period.
